g.text: Provide Available PmaxSchedule or Tariff Table
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Started, chargingState = EVConnected, triggerReason = CablePluggedIn)
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated, chargingState = EVConnected, triggerReason = Authorized)
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated, chargingState = Charging, triggerReason = ChargingStateChanged)
Update Available PmaxSchedule or Tariff Table
Contactor Remains Closed or Opens based on Renegotiation
Optional if chargingState changes based on new schedule
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated, chargingState = SuspendedEVSE, triggerReason = ChargingStateChanged)
End Charging and Stop OCPP Transaction
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Updated, chargingState = EVConnected, triggerReason = ChargingStateChanged)
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended, chargingState = Idle, triggerReason = EVCommunicationLost)
